summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P3-A/P3-B Lifecycle Integration - ALL SPX and DXY runtime configuration and lifecycle features working perfectly. Backend API integration (10/10 passed), runtime config with MongoDB persistence, lifecycle management operational.
passed_tests: Health Check - TypeScript backend running in FRACTAL_ONLY mode
P3-A SPX Runtime Config - POST /api/fractal/v2.1/admin/governance/model-config with asset=SPX saves to MongoDB (windowLen:90, topK:15, consensusThreshold:0.06)
P3-A SPX Runtime Debug - GET runtime-debug?asset=SPX shows configSource=mongo with correct parameters
P3-A SPX Focus-Pack Runtime Config - GET /api/spx/v2.1/focus-pack?horizon=90d shows windowLen=90, topK=15 from MongoDB config
P3-A SPX Lifecycle Promote - POST promote with asset=SPX creates version v20260302.194502.947
P3-A SPX Lifecycle Status - GET status?asset=SPX shows activeVersion and config hash
P3-B DXY Runtime Config - POST with asset=DXY saves syntheticWeight:0.35, replayWeight:0.45, macroWeight:0.20
P3-B DXY Lifecycle Promote - POST promote with asset=DXY creates version v20260302.194503.224
P3-B DXY Terminal - GET /api/fractal/dxy/terminal?focus=90d returns synthetic path in regime mode
BTC Lifecycle Regression - BTC lifecycle remains operational (no regression detected)
